1.hook: She sent us a plain wall. We sent back this...
1.caption:
The brief was simple — a corner with soul. Built for a client in her Pune 2BHK. From concept to installation: 12 days.

Looking for something like this? DM us your space photo or WhatsApp us for a free design consultation.
